Collapsed lifter on cyl 6. Lifter tick / knock since 100,200 miles. Car has a warranty until 5/2026 or 171,000 miles and they refuse to honor it. Car has a steering issue. Two separate chevy dealerships unable to fix. vanderevere charged me 500-600 to fix NOTHING AT ALL. serpenti

narrative.headline: What 2016 Chevrolet Ss owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 24 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (50% of reports).
